title: One Man's Journey
writer: Lester Cohen, Samuel Ornitz, Katharine Haviland-Taylor
actors: Lionel Barrymore, May Robson, Dorothy Jordan
plot: Dr. Eli Watt, a widower, comes to a small town, considering himself a failure in his attempt to have a meaningful career in New York. He raises his son Jimmy as well as Letty, a baby whose mother has died in childbirth and whose f...
